author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: ferrotorch-gpt2 now works out of the box. 'cargo run --release -- "The meaning of life is"' auto-downloads vocab.json (1MB), merges.txt (0.4MB), model.safetensors (523MB) from HuggingFace on first run, caches in ~/.cache/ferrotorch-gpt2/, loads the full GPT-2 124M, and generates coherent text. Second run skips downloads entirely. No flags needed for basic generation.
